0.q: NtCIPK11 overexpression affected the expression of proline metabolism-related genes and proline accumulation... the proline content was significantly higher in the transgenic seedlings than that of in the WT plants under 100 mM NaCl treatment

2.q: phylogenetic analysis and subcellular localization analysis of NtP5CS-GFP protein in onion cells showed that NtP5CS was a new P5CS gene and was involved in Pro synthesis in N. tangutorum.

3.q: exogenous expression of NtSOS2 affected the expression of ion transporter-related genes and can rescue the phenotype of sos2-1 under salt stress

4.q: Exogenous expression of NtSOS2 affected the expression of ion transporter-related genes and can rescue the phenotype of sos2-1 under salt stress. All these results revealed that NtSOS2 plays an important role in plant salt stress tolerance.

5.q: Seven collinear CBL pairs were identified in the N. tangutorum genome: NtCBL1-1 and NtCBL1-2 ...

6.q: Calcineurin B-like proteins (CBLs) are a family of Ca2+ receptors... CBLs have a typical EF-hand domain that binds calcium ions; transgenic Arabidopsis expressing NtCBL1-1 exhibited increased tolerance to drought and salt stress.
